# P4 — Submission Package

**Target journal:** Journal of Asian Business and Economic Studies (JABES; Emerald on behalf of UEH; Scopus Q1 + WoS; IF 3.9/3.3; ASEAN CI; EconLit; ERIM; Diamond OA — no APC)
**Folder:** `P4_Singapore_JABES/`
**Generated:** 2026-06-02

## 📦 Files in this folder

### Submission documents (required by editor)
- `01_manuscript_blinded.docx` — Blinded manuscript for reviewer (no author identifiers)
- `02_title_page.docx` — Title page with author info (separate upload, not for reviewer)
- `03_cover_letter.docx` — Cover letter to Editor-in-Chief (JABES)

### Replication package (for reviewers + OSF)
- `p4_singapore_mir_replication_data.xlsx` — Variables coded + regression results + figure data (Excel workbook, 5 sheets). Filename retained for reference compatibility; contents are P4 Singapore data only.

### Figures (3 files in `figures/`)
- `figures/figure_1_conceptual_model.png`
- `figures/figure_2_dai_marginal_effect.png`
- `figures/figure_3_predicted_ip_curve.png`


## 📊 Replication data structure (p4_singapore_mir_replication_data.xlsx)

| Sheet | Contents |
|---|---|
| `00_README` | Generation date, source repo, sheet index |
| `01_Variable_Codebook` | Each variable: name, label, definition, source (WBES item), role (DV/IV/Mod/Ctrl), type |
| `02_Regression_Coefficients` | Main models: β, SE, p, 95% CI for all reported terms across all model specifications |
| `03_Turning_Points` | Estimated turning points + 95% bootstrap CI (turning point ~82% FSTS) |
| `04_Robustness` | Sensitivity tests, alternative specifications, auxiliary tables |
| `05_Figure_Data` | Source data for each figure (one block per figure) |

## ✅ Pre-submission checklist

- [ ] Read JABES "Author Guidelines" current at time of submission (https://www.emeraldgrouppublishing.com/journal/jabes)
- [ ] **Submission URL CONFIRMED**: `https://mc.manuscriptcentral.com/jabes` ✓
- [ ] Confirm word count within JABES norm (8,000–12,000 main text)
- [ ] Run Paperpal Preflight AI check on the manuscript (Emerald-recommended pre-submission tool)
- [ ] Confirm format-specific requirements:
  - [ ] APA 7 references (JABES uses Emerald Harvard; typesetters convert post-acceptance)
  - [ ] Structured abstract (Purpose / Design / Findings / Limitations / Practical / Social / Originality)
  - [ ] Abstract ≤250 words including keywords + classification
  - [ ] Anonymous main manuscript with title page submitted separately
- [ ] Verify blinded manuscript has no author identifiers (already verified)
- [ ] Confirm declarations: conflict of interest, funding, data availability, AI use, CRediT
- [ ] Reduce tables 12 → 5–6 inline + supplementary online; figures 10 → 4–6 inline + supplementary
- [ ] Submit via ScholarOne: https://mc.manuscriptcentral.com/jabes
